claim_bullets.bullet_text: Characters attack monsters with a hit check using attack power and 2D, where the target is the monster's evasion points (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.43-45).
Characters can deal critical damage with strike rolls if the 2D roll meets or exceeds the critical target (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.43-45).
Monsters attack characters using evasion checks with evasion speed and 2D, where the target is the monster's attack points (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.46-47).

source_record_text: Chapter 4.5-4.6 of Sword World RPG - Complete Edition covers attack mechanics for characters against monsters and monsters against characters.
